metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: Feeling like your wallet is lighter than it used to be? Don't rule out being able to afford a new PC.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-04-06

metric_name: Best Buy: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: BestBuy.com still offers free shipping. This week solidified a pattern we've noticed that Best Buy almost consistently offers the lowest prices on Sony PCs.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: This week, save $100-$210 on all desktops and laptops, and pay no interest for 12 months when buying with your Circuit City charge card. Circuitcity.com has reintroduced free shipping for a limited time on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: CompUSA is featuring the new Compaq s3200nx and s3300nx machines in bundles at $750 and $950 respectively. The s3200nx is also available this week without a monitor at Circuitcity.com and other online locations.

metric_name: eMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. If you were thinking about buying a T2460, T2042, or T1842, you're now out of luck because these models are gone from all the usual sources we check.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: Dell's online deals include $50 and $150 off the 4550 and 8250 series, respectively. Free CD-RW upgrade in second bay has returned for all models, as well as free shipping.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: Gateway.com has finally joined the free shipping bandwagon for good. At least that's what we're inferring from its new "Shipping always included" label under the price of any model you configure.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. The PCV-RS100 has disappeared, but for less than $100 more, the new PCV-RS220 offers a much faster processor and DVD+RW/+R capabilities.

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-04-06
metric_value: HP Online offers competitive prices on its retail models, although national retailers always have the better bundled deals. PC Deals customized a Compaq 8000 series PC at http://www.hpshopping.com/ with a 3.06GHz processor, expecting this desktop to be lower in price than its ...
